trans-unit.target: Failed to load media. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: 将在当前集播放结束后暂停
trans-unit.target: Will pause when this track ends
Are you sure you want to delete this recording?

trans-unit.source: 当前浏览器不支持录音。
trans-unit.target: Audio recording is not supported in this browser.

trans-unit.source: 磁盘存储空间不足，建议导出或删除旧录音。
trans-unit.target: Low disk space. We recommend exporting or deleting old recordings.

trans-unit.source: 未能开启麦克风，请检查权限。
trans-unit.target: Failed to access microphone. Please check permissions.
Failed to save recording. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to delete this resource?

trans-unit.source: 3. 录音前可以操作播放器设置，录音开始后播放器不可操作。
trans-unit.target: 3. Adjust player settings before recording; the player is locked once recording starts.
Are you sure you want to proceed?

trans-unit.source: 同一标题「」已存在重复的音频文件
trans-unit.target: An audio file with the same title "" already exists

trans-unit.source: 同一标题「」已存在重复的 文件
trans-unit.target: A file with the same title "" already exists

trans-unit.source: 缺少媒体文件及 .srt/.lrc 字幕文件
trans-unit.target: Missing media file and .srt/.lrc subtitle file

trans-unit.source: 未找到有效的字幕条目
2. 如果跟不上原音，可以设置倍速、单句暂停模式。
trans-unit.target: 2. If you can't follow the original audio, you can set the speed and single sentence pause mode.

trans-unit.source: 4. 除了倍速、音量、单句暂停模式，跟读模式会忽略其他的播放器设置。
trans-unit.target: 4. Apart from playback speed, volume, and the single-sentence pause mode, the shadowing mode ignores other player settings..
Could not locate the subtitle sentence

trans-unit.source: 该句无录音，无法同步播放
trans-unit.target: This sentence has no recording; cannot play in sync

trans-unit.source: 2. 每句最多保存若干条录音，可在字幕行右侧下拉查看。
trans-unit.target: 2. Each sentence can keep several recordings; open the dropdown on the right of a subtitle line to view them.

trans-unit.source: 3. 听音和录音期间播放器不可操作。
trans-unit.target: 3. The player controls are unavailable while listening or recording.

trans-unit.source: 当前音频的跟读录音已达上限（条），删除旧录音后可继续。
trans-unit.target: Shadowing recordings for this audio have reached the limit (). Delete older ones to continue.

trans-unit.source: 该句录音已达上限（条），删除旧录音后可继续。
trans-unit.target: Recordings for this sentence have reached the limit (). Delete older ones to continue.

trans-unit.source: 拖拽或选择音视频（可同时放入同名 .srt/.lrc 字幕）
trans-unit.target: Drag and drop or select audio/video (you can also include matching .srt/.lrc subtitles)

trans-unit.source: 以下文件与已有内容冲突，请选择跳过或覆盖。
trans-unit.target: The following files conflict with existing content. Choose to skip or overwrite.

trans-unit.source: 导入过程中发生未知错误
trans-unit.target: An unknown error occurred during import

trans-unit.source: 已跳过 个重复文件
暂无内容，请先导入音视频
trans-unit.target: No content yet. Please import audio or video first.

trans-unit.source: 该媒体已有不同内容的字幕
trans-unit.target: This media already has different subtitles
Failed to import subtitles. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: 跟读（Shadowing）：点击下方【麦克风】开始【同步】跟读；录音前有倒计时提醒（默认开启），录音停止后自动保存。
trans-unit.target: Shadowing: tap the microphone below to start synchronized shadowing. A countdown reminder plays before recording (on by default); recordings are saved automatically when you stop.

trans-unit.source: 今天还没有练习记录，去导入材料开始练习吧。
trans-unit.target: No practice yet today. Import materials and start practicing.

trans-unit.source: 同一标题「」已存在重复的视频文件
trans-unit.target: A duplicate video already exists for the title 「」

trans-unit.source: 字幕已存在且内容相同，已跳过
trans-unit.target: Subtitles already exist with the same content; skipped

trans-unit.source: 该媒体已有不同内容的字幕，选择覆盖将替换原字幕
trans-unit.target: This media already has different subtitles; overwriting will replace them

trans-unit.source: 已存在同名媒体且内容不同。覆盖将替换媒体文件；练习记录不会自动迁移
trans-unit.target: Media with the same name already exists but content differs. Overwriting replaces the media file; practice history is not migrated automatically

trans-unit.source: 媒体已存在且内容相同，已跳过
trans-unit.target: Media already exists with the same content; skipped

trans-unit.source: 已存在同标题「」的（）。覆盖将删除旧文件；练习记录不会自动迁移
trans-unit.target: Media titled 「」 already exists as (). Overwriting deletes the old file; practice history is not migrated automatically

trans-unit.source: 字幕文件没有有效片段
trans-unit.target: Subtitle file has no valid segments

trans-unit.source: 请先导入对应的媒体文件
trans-unit.target: Please import the matching media file first

trans-unit.source: 同标题存在多个媒体，请将字幕与对应音/视频一并导入
trans-unit.target: Multiple media share this title; import the subtitle together with the matching audio/video

trans-unit.source: 请选择 .srt 或 .lrc 字幕文件
trans-unit.target: Please select an .srt or .lrc subtitle file

trans-unit.source: 任意语言的听说练习平台。导入音视频后即可开始练习，字幕可稍后补充。
trans-unit.target: A listening and speaking practice platform for any language. Import audio or video to get started; subtitles can be added later.

trans-unit.source: 搜索媒体 / 录音标题
筛选与排序同时作用于下方媒体库与录音库
trans-unit.target: Filters and sorting apply to both the media library and recordings below

trans-unit.source: 统计为有效练习时长（播放/录音等实际练习时间），非墙钟时间。
trans-unit.target: Statistics use effective practice time (actual play/record time), not wall-clock time.
No practice data in this range.

trans-unit.source: 当前不是录音状态，无法暂停
当前不是暂停状态，无法继续
当前没有正在进行的录音

trans-unit.target: Tap Stop when shadowing is completed

trans-unit.source: 5. 录音时底部会显示状态与波形，全屏字幕下也可看到。
trans-unit.target: 5. During recording, the status and waveform will be displayed at the bottom, which is also visible under full-screen subtitles.

trans-unit.source: 4. 录音时底部会显示状态与波形，全屏字幕下也可看到。
trans-unit.target: 4. During recording, the status and waveform will be displayed at the bottom, which is also visible under full-screen subtitles.

trans-unit.source: 点击下方麦克风开始同步跟读；录音时底部显示状态与波形。
trans-unit.target: Tap the microphone below to start synchronized shadowing; the status and waveform will be displayed at the bottom during recording.

trans-unit.source: 点击字幕行麦克风：先听原音，再录音；底部会显示状态与波形。
trans-unit.target: Tap the subtitle line microphone: listen to original first, then record; the status and waveform will be displayed at the bottom.

trans-unit.source: 导入完成，但有部分条目失败
trans-unit.target: Import completed, but some items failed

trans-unit.source: 导出备份可用于换设备迁移。设置始终包含在备份中。
trans-unit.target: Exported backups can be used for migration to another device. Settings are always included in the backup.

trans-unit.source: 媒体文件若未纳入备份，请在库页用相同文件名重新导入原音视频与字幕，录音即可对齐。
trans-unit.target: If media files are not included in the backup, re-import the original audio/video and subtitles with the same filename on the Library page to align the recordings.

trans-unit.source: 默认关闭；体积可能很大
trans-unit.target: Disabled by default; file size might be very large

trans-unit.source: 以下能力尚未开放，入口预留以便后续扩展。
trans-unit.target: The following features are not yet available; entry points are reserved for future updates.

trans-unit.source: 导入环境噪音，用于听力辨音训练。
trans-unit.target: Import ambient noise for listening discrimination training.

trans-unit.source: 为音视频设置自定义封面。
trans-unit.target: Set custom cover for audio and video.

trans-unit.source: 调整后仅影响之后的新建录音与存储提示；不会删除已有录音。
trans-unit.target: Adjusting this only affects new recordings and storage prompts going forward; it will not delete existing recordings.

trans-unit.source: 单个媒体最大跟读录音数
控制练习流程中的倒计时与模式说明是否自动跳过。
trans-unit.target: Control whether the countdown and mode descriptions during practice are automatically skipped.

trans-unit.source: 开启后录音前不再显示 3 秒倒计时。
trans-unit.target: When enabled, the 3-second countdown before recording will no longer be displayed.

trans-unit.source: 开启后进入跟读模式时不再弹出说明。
trans-unit.target: When enabled, instructions will no longer pop up when entering shadowing mode.

trans-unit.source: 开启后进入回声模式时不再弹出说明。
trans-unit.target: When enabled, instructions will no longer pop up when entering echo mode.

trans-unit.source: 请至少选择一种数据导出
trans-unit.target: Please select at least one data type to export

trans-unit.source: 不支持的备份格式，请升级应用后再试
trans-unit.target: Unsupported backup format, please upgrade the app and try again

trans-unit.source: 备份文件损坏：manifest 无效
无法打开备份文件，请确认是有效的 ZIP
trans-unit.target: Failed to open backup file. Please make sure it is a valid ZIP file.

trans-unit.source: 当前库已有同名条目时将跳过，不会覆盖；设置将被覆盖。
trans-unit.target: If an entry with the same name already exists in the current library, it will be skipped and not overwritten; settings will be overwritten.

trans-unit.source: 暂不支持自定义快捷键。
trans-unit.target: Custom shortcuts are not supported yet.
No original audio for sync play

trans-unit.source: 无练习片段，无法同步播放
trans-unit.target: No practice segments for sync play

trans-unit.source: 录音中无法预览，请先结束录音。
trans-unit.target: Cannot preview while recording. Please stop recording first.

trans-unit.source: 回声（Echo）：按字幕逐句练习。点击字幕行右侧【麦克风】：先播原音 → 倒计时提醒（默认开启）→ 录音；跟读完后手动停止录音。
trans-unit.target: Echo: practice one subtitle line at a time. Tap the microphone on a subtitle line → original audio plays first → countdown reminder (on by default) → recording; stop recording manually when finished.

trans-unit.source: 已导出 条异常日志
确定清空全部异常日志？此操作不可恢复。
trans-unit.target: Clear all error logs? This cannot be undone.

trans-unit.source: 异常会保存在本机，可导出后发送给开发者以便排查问题。不会上传到服务器。
trans-unit.target: Errors are stored on this device. Export them and send to the developer for troubleshooting. Nothing is uploaded to a server.
Failed to add. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: 请从媒体或播放列表进入练习。
trans-unit.target: Please enter practice from media or playlist.

trans-unit.source: 该媒体不存在或无法加载。
trans-unit.target: This media does not exist or failed to load.

trans-unit.source: 媒体 "" 不在当前播放列表，已回退到第一首。
trans-unit.target: Media "" is not in the current playlist, reverted to the first track.

trans-unit.source: 加载播放列表详情失败
该播放列表名称已存在
trans-unit.target: A playlist with this name already exists

trans-unit.source: 当前播放列表为空，请先添加媒体。
trans-unit.target: This playlist is empty. Add media first.

trans-unit.source: 在这里快速开始练习，并集中管理播放列表中的音视频与顺序。
trans-unit.target: Start practice quickly and manage media and order in your playlists.

trans-unit.source: 确定将该媒体从播放列表移除吗？
trans-unit.target: Remove this media from the playlist?

trans-unit.source: 上次练到这份播放列表，可直接继续。
trans-unit.target: You practiced this playlist last. Continue from here.

trans-unit.source: 确定删除该播放列表吗？

trans-unit.target: App is ready for offline use

trans-unit.source: 发现新版本，可立即更新
trans-unit.target: Update found — you can refresh now

trans-unit.source: 可将本应用安装到桌面或主屏幕。更新只刷新应用壳，不会删除本机媒体、字幕与录音。
trans-unit.target: Install this app to your desktop or home screen. Updates only refresh the app shell and do not delete local media, subtitles, or recordings.

trans-unit.source: 浏览器标签页（可从浏览器菜单添加到主屏幕）
trans-unit.target: Browser tab (add to home screen from the browser menu)
A new version is waiting to install

trans-unit.source: 管理偏好、练习限额、数据备份、应用更新与诊断。
trans-unit.target: Manage preferences, practice limits, backups, app updates, and diagnostics.
Could not locate the source sentence
Failed to add to sentence bank. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: 已导出备份（录音 ，学习记录 ，句库 ，媒体 ）
该句子不存在或无法加载
trans-unit.target: This sentence does not exist or could not be loaded
Failed to load. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: 源媒体已删除，无法查看来源
trans-unit.target: Source media was deleted; cannot view source

trans-unit.source: 收藏喜欢的句子，单独练习或跳回原媒体上下文。
trans-unit.target: Save favorite sentences, practice them alone, or jump back to the original media context.

trans-unit.source: 句库为空。在练习页点击字幕旁的 ☆ 即可加入。
trans-unit.target: Sentence bank is empty. Tap ☆ next to a subtitle on the practice page to add one.

trans-unit.source: 确定从句库移除该句吗？
trans-unit.target: Remove this sentence from the bank?

trans-unit.source: 从句库移除失败，请重试
trans-unit.target: Failed to remove from sentence bank. Please try again.

trans-unit.source: 搜索句子 / 来源标题
